scripts.build:executables: bun build ../../server.ts --compile --target=bun-linux-x64 --outfile=../../dist-bin/d2-playground-linux && bun build ../../server.ts --compile --target=bun-windows-x64 --outfile=../../dist-bin/d2-playground-win.exe && bun build ../../server.ts --compile --target=bun-darwin-arm64 --outfile=../../dist-bin/d2-playground-mac-arm && bun build ../../server.ts --compile --target=bun-darwin-x64 --outfile=../../dist-bin/d2-playground-mac-intel
